column70: During the onboarding call, the RM committed to sending his official RM confirmation sms through "GP Info" masking, and the customer agreed to receive the information. However, upon verification, it was found that the RM did not send the required RM confirmation Push SMS which was necessary to deliver as promised. As a result, the commitment made to the customer was not fulfilled, making this transaction a Critical Error (CE) due to False Commitment.
column188: Misbehave/unprofessional approach - (CE-A) :- During the onboarding call, the RM committed to sending his official RM confirmation sms through "GP Info" masking, and the customer agreed to receive the information. However, upon verification, it was found that the RM did not send the required RM confirmation Push SMS which was necessary to deliver as promised. As a result, the commitment made to the customer was not fulfilled, making this transaction a Critical Error (CE) due to False Commitment.
